art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 is actively underway (March 27-29), with VIP days signaling recovery and strong collector interest in Asia-Pacific artists.
top_stories: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 runs through March 29 at HKCEC, featuring 240 galleries.
Market sentiment shows resilience with collectors adopting a more long-term acquisition strategy.
High-end market activity remains strong despite broader global economic caution.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI traded at 5,372.31 as of 1:17 p.m. on March 27, narrowing losses from the opening dip after a heavy sell-off in semiconductors.
key_factors: KOSPI volatility persists due to 'TurboQuant' factors and geopolitical tensions in Iran.
Semiconductor sector continues to face downward pressure, though retail buying is providing some support.
Market remains cautious heading into the weekend as investors digest recent price shocks.
